template: Phi magnitude dose-response — encoding strategy taxonomy complete across 3 families
key_finding: Phi uses ANALOG encoding (gradual, no cliffs) like Llama, not DIGITAL like Qwen. K > V confirmed under magnitude at σ=1 (+20.9pp), σ=2 (+46.5pp), σ=5 (+48.8pp). Strong superadditivity (10.6x at σ=2). V-only σ=1: 43/43 (100%). Text ≥98.4% at all doses. Encoding strategy taxonomy complete: digital=Qwen-Base, analog=Llama-Instruct+Phi-Instruct.
evidence_impact: Strong — completes 3-family encoding strategy taxonomy. K > V extends to magnitude perturbation on MHA. Analog encoding + strong superadditivity is confirmed on 2/3 families. Digital encoding may be Base-model-specific.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Test a base model to determine if digital encoding is Base-specific. (2) Evidence consolidation — 36 cycles of findings need synthesis. (3) K-only PGD on Phi (MHA).

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space. Combined p=0.013 (K 6/56 vs V 0/57). Survives maximum-effort V-only disconfirmation.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal across 3 families. Explained by attention sinks at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation UNIVERSAL: 3 families x 3 positions = 9 conditions, including MHA. Now confirmed under BOTH direction AND magnitude.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 3 families (Qwen GQA, Llama GQA, Phi MHA) x 3 positions x 2 perturbation types. V-only early+mid = 297/298.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE: Digital (Qwen-Base, cliffs) vs Analog (Llama-Instruct + Phi-Instruct MHA, gradual). Digital may be Base-specific.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck. QK/OV framework grounds K>V. K-only PGD is novel experimental validation

null_space_kv_unification.status: STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT: K-only PGD 6/56 vs V-only 0/57 (p=0.013). V-only failure is NOT hyperparameter artifact.

disruption_vs_redirection.status: V=disruption (0 numeric redirects ever), K=redirection (2 genuine numeric redirects). Quality distinction holds.

mha_vs_gqa.status: K > V holds on MHA (Phi) identically to GQA (Qwen/Llama). Phi analog encoding. GQA confound eliminated.
